title: micromeria graeca subsp. graeca
intro: Micromeria graeca subsp. graeca is a species of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae. It is also known as Greek mountain tea, which is a popular herbal remedy used in traditional medicine, particularly in Greece and other parts of Europe. The plant is rich in antioxidants and has anti-inflammatory properties, which contribute to its medicinal value. The leaves of Micromeria graeca subsp. graeca can be prepared as a tea, and the plant is also used in herbal infusions and tinctures, making it a popular choice for promoting digestive health, reducing stress, and improving overall well-being.
